subject: Question about billing
description: Hi, I just wanted to ask a quick question about my upcoming invoice. Can you clarify the charge on the second line? Thanks.

subject: App crashes on launch
description: The app keeps crashing when I try to open it. I've reinstalled it twice but it's still completely unusable. Please help.

subject: Minor typo on website
description: Just wanted to point out there's a small typo on the pricing page. It says 'anually' instead of 'annually'.

subject: System down, losing money!
description: Your API is completely down and we are losing thousands of dollars every minute! We need this fixed immediately or we will be talking to our lawyer and demanding a full refund.

subject: How to change password?
description: Can someone tell me how to change my password? The link in the settings doesn't seem to work for me.

subject: Need help with integration
description: We are trying to set up the new integration but getting a 403 error. Can someone jump on a quick call with us?

subject: Urgent: Cannot access account
description: I'm locked out of my account and I need to run payroll today! This is critical, please reset my access immediately.

subject: Refund request
description: I forgot to cancel my subscription and just got charged. I haven't used the service in months. Can I get a refund?
